critical.issue: closeEvent does not stop running workers — subprocesses become orphaned, QThread destroyed while running (UB/crash)
critical.fix: Call stop() on all active workers, wait() with timeout before accepting close event

critical.issue: fourdgs_worker never initialized to None — uses fragile hasattr() checks
install/uninstall_sharp_module() blocks main thread — GUI freezes entirely
critical.fix: Run in QThread worker like Extractor360Tab does

critical.issue: install_deps/uninstall_deps/download_model all block main thread — GUI freezes
install_dependencies() calls subprocess.check_call() on main thread AND subprocess is never imported — NameError + GUI freeze
critical.fix: Add import and move to background worker

warnings.issue: Worker signal connections never disconnected — old workers could emit signals after replacement
warnings.fix: Disconnect old worker signals or use UniqueConnection

warnings.issue: is_running flag has data race — written by main thread, read by worker thread without synchronization
process.wait() has no timeout — could block indefinitely if child ignores SIGTERM
reset_factory() uses shell=True with string-constructed rm -rf command
Worker instantiated with no args then attributes set directly — fragile pattern
closeEvent on QWidget in QTabWidget not reliably called — servers may keep running
warnings.fix: Have main window explicitly call stop_server()

warnings.issue: Language observer references prevent GC — potential memory leak
warnings.fix: Use weak references or provide remove_observer()

info.issue: Signal connection pattern duplicated across all modes in process()
ResetDialog repurposes btn_quit key then hardcodes French string check
SessionManager reaches into config_tab widget internals
setEnabled(False) called unconditionally even when user cancels
Bare except in stop() swallows SystemExit/KeyboardInterrupt
retranslate_ui uses btn_stop text when processing — incorrect label
